title: Vesting Schedule Row Body

amountNumerator.description: Numerator of the vesting amount for the row/tranche

amountDenominator.description: Denominator of the vesting amount for the row/tranche

vestingPeriodLength.description: Number of periods between the row/tranche and the previous row/tranche (or vesting start date)

vestingPeriodType.description: Type of vesting period for the row/tranche

description: List of all rows/tranches for the vesting schedule
